channel.title: marfillaster · notes
channel.description: Build logs and case studies on MikroTik RB5009 home networking behind residential CGNAT, residential solar and battery, and plug-in EV running costs.

item.title: BYD Sealion 6 PHEV running cost — Cavite, Philippines
item.description: 7,234 km of odometer- and meter-tracked driving: electric-vs-fuel running cost, 66% EV usage split, combined 5.8 L/100km efficiency, and battery health.

item.title: Residential 6.5 kWp solar performance — Cavite, Philippines
item.description: Six months of real generation, self-sufficiency, battery behavior, and bill impact from a 6.5 kWp / 14.3 kWh / 8 kW system, with monthly tariff math and ROI payback.

item.title: Multi-homing IPv6 over CGNAT on RouterOS
item.description: Run the VPS and Route64 paths at the same time under one announceable /48: own ASN, two BGP sessions, BFD on the VPS path, and RouterOS best-path selecting the active default.

item.title: Routed IPv6 over CGNAT via a VPS-routed /48
item.description: Equal path A: a $3/mo VPS that routes a /48 to its instance, WireGuard from the RB5009, eBGP between them. Includes Ubuntu/BIRD, VyOS, and CHR relay variants.

item.title: Per-VLAN IPv6 on RouterOS
item.description: Plumb the routable IPv6 you just stood up through to every VLAN: GUA + ULA + RA RDNSS per VLAN, IPv6 forward-chain isolation, and SLAAC anti-spoof. Path-agnostic — three per-VLAN /64 placeholders fold the /48-vs-/56 difference into one substitution table.

item.title: Fast IPv6 failover on RouterOS
item.description: Add BFD to the existing BGP session over WireGuard — fast default-route withdrawal with Ubuntu/BIRD, VyOS, or CHR relay variants. VPS path only.

item.title: A small home network behind CGNAT
item.description: Series index: overview, topology, address plan, the VPS-vs-Route64 path-choice matrix, and the ULA-only-trusted-VLAN update that keeps streaming off the routable-IPv6 path. Start here.

item.title: Replacing a Converge ONT with a GPON SFP stick on the RB5009
item.description: Skyworth GN630V to ODI DFP-34X-2C2 in a MikroTik RB5009: the SC/APC to SC/UPC connector gotcha, VLAN 10 DHCP handoff, and the minimum stick config that worked. Standalone — not part of the series above.

item.title: Trusted, IoT, and Guest VLANs on RouterOS
item.description: Split a flat home LAN into trusted, IoT, and Guest VLANs with two UniFi APs on hybrid trunks, plus a reviewable east-west firewall. Pure IPv4 plus 802.1Q; no IPv6, no VPS. The foundation the rest of the series sits on.

item.title: Encrypted DNS with a stable resolver address on RouterOS
item.description: Resolve upstream over Cloudflare DoH and hand clients a resolver address that never changes — a locally assigned ULA over RA RDNSS. No VLANs, no IPv6 uplink; works on a flat IPv4-only LAN.

item.title: Routed IPv6 over CGNAT via Route64
item.description: Equal path B: Route64's free WireGuard /56 — a native global /64 per VLAN, nothing to operate, fast fail-to-IPv4 on outage. Single broker-managed uplink by design.

item.title: Running the UniFi controller on the RB5009
item.description: Run the UniFi Network Application and its MongoDB on a MikroTik RB5009 as RouterOS containers — no second always-on box. USB swap, the ARMv8.0-A Mongo 4.4.18 pin, veths, memory caps, verification.

item.title: Net Metering Journey in General Trias
item.description: A realistic, step-by-step account of getting a 6 kWp rooftop array approved for net metering with Meralco in Cavite — the PEE-sealed A3 SLD, the forms, the venues, the fees, and a ~50-day timeline.

item.title: Solar Panel Installation Application Guide for Lancaster New City
item.description: The exact CIDC documents to prepare before installing solar panels on your Lancaster New City unit — with a copy-ready Letter of Intent template, where to submit, and how to get your gate pass on the same visit.
